profile.name: Shamil Alisultanov
about: I'm a web developer who loves turning complex tasks into clear and user-friendly solutions. I work with interfaces, architecture, and frontend development.
It's important to me that a product is not only beautiful but also useful: fast, logical, and comfortable for the user.
profile.contactText: I'm always open to discussing new projects and collaboration.

services.description: I build fast and scalable interfaces with Vue 3, TypeScript, and a modern stack.

services.description: I design and implement server-side logic, APIs, and integrations for full-fledged web products.
